_publications._publicationTitle: Survival of Human Neurofibroma in Immunodeficient Mice and Initial Results of Therapy With Pirfenidone
_publications._context: Human neurofibromas were obtained from four patients with neurofibromatosis who underwent removal of plexiform neurofibroma; 212 neurofibromas implanted subcutaneously in 59 SCID mice

basicInfo.description: Plexiform neurofibroma xenografts from four NF1 patients established subcutaneously in SCID mice; used to evaluate anti-fibrotic therapy with pirfenidone
basicInfo.clinicalData: 4 patients with NF1, plexiform neurofibroma; 212 neurofibromas implanted across 59 SCID mice
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Medical Genetics, Mayo Clinic
